nodes.html: The Enabled Talent Awards honor individuals and organizations that go beyond compliance, creating workplaces that celebrate diversity, empower people of all abilities, and champion equitable access to meaningful work.

any.message: Element has sufficient color contrast of 14.61

nodes.html: Through these awards, we shine a light on leaders who inspire change across Canada and beyond, in business, education, technology, and community development.
